---
name: Outdated or broken diagram
about: Report a broken image, outdated diagram, or asset with a problem
title: "chore: [SECTION] diagram/image issue"
labels: ["diagram", "assets"]
assignees: ""
---

## Diagram or image with a problem

**Chapter / Section:** <!-- e.g., Chapter IV — 4.3.3 Container Level Diagram -->
**Asset path:** <!-- e.g., assets/4.Strategic-Level-Product-Design/4.3.Software-Architecture/Container.png -->

## Type of problem

- [ ] Broken image (not rendering in the README)
- [ ] Incorrect path referenced in the README
- [ ] Outdated diagram (does not reflect the current design version)
- [ ] Low quality or insufficient resolution
- [ ] Wrong format (should be `.png` or `.jpg`)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Description of the problem

<!-- Describe what is wrong with the diagram or image -->

## Tool used for the diagram

- [ ] Miro
- [ ] Structurizr / C4 Model
- [ ] draw.io / Lucidchart
- [ ] Other: ___

## Evidence

<!-- If it is a broken image it will not be visible. Describe what you see or attach an error screenshot -->

## Suggested assignee

<!-- Mention the team member who owns this diagram according to CODEOWNERS -->
